comment: 55yo male, 18 years occupational benzene exposure (petroleum refining), no current hematologic malignancy. CBC stable. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = CBC q6-12mo with peripheral smear review for cytopenias + low-threshold bone marrow eval if persistent cytopenia; alternative = symptom-driven evaluation. Validates v0.3 benzene → AML / MDS prevention pilot.
